title: Duck Totems
description: Totems of the Undiaings are now cute little ducks with a new totem sound. ⚠️Important: Sodium and Iris Shaders are required ⚠️
body:
![The pop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Me348QaH/images/a72e34a37f52a8b9803510adb89403afa2d720e2.gif) 

_🦆 Duck Totems 1.3 – When Survival Gets a Little Quacky_

**⚠️Important: Sodium and Iris Shaders are required ⚠️**

Duck Totems 1.2 transforms your regular Totem of Undying into something far more entertaining — a Duck Totem! This lightweight resource pack replaces the default totem textures and model with a cute, duck-themed version that brings a touch of humor to your Minecraft world. When activated, the totem doesn’t just save your life — it quacks! 3 custom sound effect plays whenever the totem is used, making every near-death moment unexpectedly funny and charming.

_Powerd by AgnteEnte_
